productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Algnc Navy Blue Backpack
description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, super cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this backpack from nike. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with your friends. A stunningly good looking bag, with loads of space, it'll become your best buddy in no time. Be prepared to be swept off your feet by this awesome backpack! Product DetailsMade of blended fabric for durability and styleNylon lining for increased durabilityOne main zipped compartment with a mesh pocket and organizer pouches to accommodate all your essentialsOne pocket on the front for earphones and other essentialsnike swoosh appliquéd on the frontmanchester united branding appliqued on the frontPadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesHaul loop for handling easeFabric zips and sliders for easy useWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and CarePolyester and nylonRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash Size MeasurementHeight: 49"Width:   30"Depth: 13"
